originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Advantage Normalization for Long Horizons in P3O Algorithm
summary: Worked on normalizing the advantage function in a new algorithm (p3o) to handle long horizons without requiring lambda/gamma hyperparameters. Debugged clipping issues and adjusted the normalization factor, eventually finding a promising approach that retained signal at short horizons while zeroing out noise at long horizons.
